REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (110 Santa Clara Avenue, San Francisco Ca)
Off Calendar Nov-20-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for and with Richard Guggenhime (Petitioner).

The sale was confirmed at $1,800,000.00 to Pin Gao based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed October 31, 2013. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). No additional bond is required.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
